rules.name: identity-declaration
rules.requirement: Name repo, branch/worktree, PR/sprint, lane, owned scope, forbidden scope, expected artifacts, and specified validation order.

rules.name: evidence-before-confidence
rules.requirement: Inspect repository evidence before concluding or inventing.

rules.name: existing-authority-before-invention
rules.requirement: Reuse current rules, maps, workflows, registries, schemas, helpers, validators, and generated-output policy.

rules.name: preservation-before-cleanup
rules.requirement: Preserve unrelated or unpublished state and checkpoint coherent owned work before broad or risky operations.

rules.name: bounded-mutation-before-completion
rules.requirement: Requested repository work requires an authorized repository, Git, GitHub, runtime, deployment, merge, or release mutation plus proof.

rules.name: task-specific-override
rules.requirement: The narrowest task-specific execution and validation rules override generic closeout behavior.

rules.name: proof-level-separation
rules.requirement: contract -> harness -> static test -> build -> launcher -> command ACK -> behavior observed -> live runtime

rules.name: artifact-backed-report
rules.requirement: Completion claims name paths, freshness, exact head when relevant, checks, commit or GitHub evidence, gaps, and one next command.

rules.name: runtime-context-specialization
rules.requirement: Runtime mutation around Bannerlord must consume .tbg/workflows/runtime-context-continuity.contract.json.

rules.name: raw-evidence-boundary
rules.requirement: Raw logs, saves, crash dumps, credentials, private configuration, and machine-local junk remain local and ignored.
